message:
feat(content): add Meta Skill to projects and TLDR flywheel tools

Add the meta_skill repository across the site:

Projects page:
- Added Meta Skill entry with full details (features, installation, usage)
- Tags: Rust, Claude, Skills, CLI, DevTools, Flywheel
- Slug: meta-skill for dedicated project page
- Related projects linked to CASS and Clawdbot Skills

TLDR Flywheel page:
- Added as supporting tool with id: "ms"
- Updated tool count from 13 to 14
- Updated description to mention 4 supporting utilities
- Synergies: CASS for skill mining, CM for procedural memories

Meta Skill is a Rust CLI for managing Claude Code skills - indexing,
building, bundling, and sharing. Integrates with CASS for mining
coding session history into reusable skills.

GitHub: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/meta_skill

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Includes skills for NTM, Agent Mail, Beads Viewer, CASS, and more, plus cloud CLIs and workflow methodologies. Enables Claude-powered assistants across WhatsApp, Telegram, and web interfaces to orchestrate multi-agent development.",
     tags: ["Agents", "Claude", "Skills", "DevTools", "Flywheel"],

The meta-tool for creating and organizing the skills that make agents smarter.",

+      installation: "```bash\\n# Install via Cargo\\ncargo install meta_skill\\n\\n# Or download pre-built binary from releases\\n```",
+      usage: "```bash\\n# Index skills from a directory\\nmeta_skill index ~/.claude/skills\\n\\n# Search for skills\\nmeta_skill search 'git workflow'\\n\\n# Build a skill bundle\\nmeta_skill build my-skill --output bundle.tar.gz\\n\\n# Mine CASS for skill patterns\\nmeta_skill mine --from-cass\\n```",
+      relatedProjects: ["cass", "clawdbot-skills"],
+    },
+  },
